overall.description: A ship simulation game showing a first-person view from the vessel's bridge at night during a thunderstorm. The camera remains stationary inside the bridge, looking out over the bow deck as lightning periodically illuminates the stormy seas while navigation monitors display radar and chart data.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station overlooking bow

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the ocean surface on the left side
bright lightning strike visible on the left horizon beyond the bow
intense lightning bolt strikes on the left side, briefly lighting up the storm clouds and water

agents.ego_description: operating ship controls from the bridge, monitoring radar and navigation charts while navigating through stormy waters at night

entered.detail: navigation display showing colorful nautical chart with coastal boundaries
circular radar display with rotating sweep showing landmasses and navigation data
blue-screen status display showing vessel information
triangular bow structure of the ship with metal railings visible through the bridge window
dark choppy water extending to the horizon under storm conditions

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge at night shows the vessel moving steadily through stormy seas. Three navigation monitors display charts and radar data at the top of the frame while the bow deck cuts through dark waters ahead. Periodic lightning flashes illuminate the ocean and clouds on the left side, creating brief moments of bright contrast against the otherwise dark scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark, tempestuous ocean. It begins with a view of the bow deck cutting through deep waters, framed by navigation monitors displaying active radar and chart data. As the vessel pushes forward, the oppressive darkness is periodically broken by sudden flashes of lightning. These bursts of light illuminate the churning sea and heavy clouds to the left, creating sharp, momentary contrasts before the scene returns to its moody, nocturnal state.
